## Summary

说明本次变更目标和影响范围。

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] `feat:` new feature
- [ ] `fix:` bug fix
- [ ] `refactor:` code restructure
- [ ] `docs:` documentation update
- [ ] `test:` testing

## Logs

- Daily log:
- Debug log if bug fix:

## Verification

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `$env:PYTHONPATH = (Get-Location).Path; pytest -q`
- [ ] Manual verification if needed:

## Safety checklist

- [ ] 未提交真实患者数据
- [ ] 未提交 API Key、Token 或生产凭据
- [ ] 未提交模型权重、下载数据集或大体积运行产物
- [ ] 未修改核心算法逻辑，或已在 PR 中明确说明原因
